seoTitle: Lyonville vs Lysterfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyonville and Lysterfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyonville and Lysterfield.
heading: Lyonville vs Lysterfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyonville, Victoria and Lysterfield, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lysterfield has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Lyonville (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyonville or Lysterfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyonville has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Lysterfield scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyonville scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Lysterfield scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyonville or Lysterfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lysterfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
